CustomField.description: This field will be updated as per the value of Type field on all Supplemental Rents. If all Supplemental Rents have Type as a mix of Maintenance Reserves and End of Lease Adjustment, this field will be updated to 'Multiple'.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field will be updated as per the value of Type field on all Supplemental Rents. If all Supplemental Rents have Type as a mix of Maintenance Reserves and End of Lease Adjustment, this field will be updated to 'Multiple'.
CustomField.label: Supplemental Rent Type
